title: 3.6v Li-ion Cordless Screwdriver Kit-13pcs- Led Light| Bs Plug Adapter| Speed-180rpm| 3-5h Full Charge No Load| 800 Mah Li-mh Battery| Ideal for Home, Professional and DIY Screwing Tasks
features: Powerful 3.6V Li-Ion Battery: The Dekton Power Cordless Screwdriver is equipped with a robust 3.6V Li-Ion battery, ensuring reliable and consistent power for efficient screwdriving in various tasks. The battery provides up to 3-5 hours of no-load operation on a full charge, making it ideal for extended use without frequent recharging.

High-Speed Performance: With a speed of up to 180 RPM, this cordless screwdriver offers rapid and efficient screwdriving, allowing you to complete your projects quickly and with minimal effort. The high-speed functionality is perfect for both home and professional use, delivering performance that meets demanding needs.

Convenient LED Light: The integrated LED light illuminates your work area, providing better visibility and accuracy in low-light conditions. This feature is particularly useful for working in dark or confined spaces, ensuring that you can see and handle screws with precision.

Complete 13-Piece Kit: This versatile kit includes 13 essential pieces, offering a range of screwdriver bits and accessories to handle various screwing tasks. Whether you're working on home improvement projects, professional jobs, or DIY crafts, this comprehensive set ensures you have the right tool for every job.

BS Plug Adapter: The screwdriver comes with a BS plug adapter, making it compatible with standard electrical outlets. This feature provides convenience and flexibility, allowing you to charge the screwdriver easily and use it wherever you need it.
description: Introducing the Dekton Power 3.6V Li-ion Cordless Screwdriver Kit, your ultimate tool for efficient and effortless screwing tasks. This versatile screwdriver kit is designed to meet the needs of both home users and professionals, making it an essential addition to any toolkit. Equipped with a powerful 3.6V Li-ion battery, this cordless screwdriver delivers reliable performance with a maximum speed of 180 RPM, ensuring swift and precise screwdriving for a variety of applications. The kit includes 13 essential pieces, including a set of high-quality screwdriver bits to tackle a wide range of tasks. The Dekton Power screwdriver features a built-in LED light that illuminates your work area, providing enhanced visibility even in dimly lit spaces. This practical feature ensures you can work comfortably and accurately, regardless of the lighting conditions. The screwdriver is powered by an 800mAh Li-MH battery, which offers a substantial runtime on a single charge, reducing the need for frequent recharges. With a full charge time of just 3 to 5 hours, you can quickly get back to your projects without long waiting periods. Included with the kit is a BS plug adapter, making it convenient to use the screwdriver in various locations. The ergonomic design of the screwdriver ensures a comfortable grip, allowing for extended use without fatigue. Its compact size and lightweight construction make it easy to maneuver in tight spaces, while the high-speed performance enables you to complete tasks efficiently.
